patches.summary: Patch topic/compare/mispriced and add Polymarket+Kalshi discovery helpers to close the 16 gaps surfaced by live dogfooding (NBA WCF, Kanye, NBA draft, World Cup).
patches.reason: topic FTS query AND-joined hyphenated terms and the BM25-only ranker buried high-volume series markets, dropping participants from multi-outcome events. Kalshi sync wrote list-shape payloads with null prices. compare and mispriced returned opaque empty results on no-pair. The /public-search proxy missed Polymarket celebrity hub topics. Discovery commands (polymarket event-of, polymarket siblings, kalshi-series-search) were missing.
patches.validated_outcome: topic kanye returns the same hit count as topic kanye-west; topic 'NBA Western Conference Finals' surfaces KXNBAWEST; topic 2026-world-cup force-includes USA; polymarket siblings will-ghana-win-the-2026-fifa-world-cup includes the USA market with non-null yesPercent; kalshi sync backfills active high-volume markets; compare returns structured unpaired diagnostic on no-pair; mispriced skips untraded; new commands registered.
patches.upstream_issue: Pending: file against mvanhorn/cli-printing-press to backport ranker + discovery shape into the generator templates.
